name: (still) Totally Not Dating
description:
Guess what gamers, she's back, and this time with

TEN NEW INTROS

still anypov

yay

Road trip arc

  1. Her parents invited you to a roadtrip

  2. She got a techdeck. She will not stop playing with the techdeck. On your thighs. (a techdeck is a mini handheld skateboard fyi)

  3. An oddly romantic view from the peak of a mountain.

    A late planttankin Halloween special

  4. Not too old to go trick or treating. Not yet.

  5. Eating candy together in a Walmart parking lot (maybe smut if you want)

    An early planttankin Christmas special

  6. Snowball fight

  7. Getting mistletoe'd

  8. She tried to wrap herself like a present, but only managed to tie her hands together (here ya go, here's your smut)

    Misc.

  9. Getting lost in a city, but together

    1. She has no idea what to do (the "make up your own story" choice)

Okay so I planned on something else, but I can't be fucked to get a pfp for it right now.

I didn't really think about it, but you can maybe use the memory to remind the bot about the prior events within the arcs

.

Here's a mini Q and A

q. "Will there be more Anna? Please bro, I need more Anna. Can we have more Anna?"

a. At this point, I've made 19 fucking intros for her. Look man, I still love her, but I don't want to be known for one specific bot that I didn't even write that differently compared to my other bots. The definition is always open. If you really want her so bad, just copy the personality into the create character thing and make your own intros. I can't promise it'll be the same, considering that I'm pretty sure the way I write the intros is what makes the bots "peak" or whatever, but if you can mimic my style, go ahead. All I ask is that you don't make the bots public.

ok thats all for that segment

.

Here's the (intended) schedule now

  1. Car girl thing. One of my request people, this one's (half) yours.

  2. Spider girl servant that will NOT stop glazing you (also a request)

  3. Rework of old bot
creator: NoLongerTankin
